meaning: n.追赶,追击vt.追赶,追逐,雕镂
examples: The movie has a car chase to end all car chases.
The thieves were caught by police after a short chase.
The chase is always much more exciting than the conquest anyway.
Spokespeople for JPMorgan Chase in New York could not be reached for comment on Monday morning.
Coca-Cola , Intel and JPMorgan Chase all announced quarterly earnings that topped Street predictions.
